This describes a behavior and constraint.

Behavior: tombstoning is a step applied to an item before it's inserted.
Constraint: once tombstoned, the item is not re-inserted.

That's EMPIRICAL.

The distinction between behavior and constraint is clear.
The description does not assert why tombstoning is done (presumed because of the product's design), nor does it claim it's a "best practice" for all systems.

The four quadrants cannot both be EMPIRICAL and NORMATIVE at the same time.

EMPIRICAL  — describes how things ARE or WORK: facts, observations, measurements, designed systems
GENERATIVE — describes how things are MADE or DONE: procedures, steps to follow, artifacts produced
NORMATIVE  — describes how things SHOULD BE: "must", "should", "do not", "never", capabilities required, failures to avoid
RELATIONAL — describes how things CONNECT: events at specific times, named actors, operating environments

The description fits EMPIRICAL perfectly.
The confidence is high (80-90%).

<standpoint>
The text describes the relationship and purpose of two systems — LumaWeave (visual graph display) and Cerebra (cognitive engine).

LumaWeave is the reader's eye through which Cerebra is seen. LumaWeave doesn't think; it displays graphs. Cerebra produces thoughts, memory events, retrieval graphs, and synthesis primitives. LumaWeave shows what's there; Cerebra shows how it's there.

The text is descriptive, not evaluative. It describes how the systems work together, not how one is better than the other. This is EMPIRICAL SCIENCE language, not PROPOSITIONAL LOGIC.

CEREBRAL — PROCESSION, SYNTHESIS, MEMORY, GRAPH, RULING, THINKING, INSIGHT, AGENT, DIVISION, RESPONSIBILITY, FAILURE, SCORING
LUMAWEAVE — GRAPH, BRAIN, INSIGHT, LEARNING, DISPLAY, COMPONENT, SIGNAL, PEER_REVIEW

## 3. Retrieval/Prompt Cycle

```text
retrieve_card(query)
construct_prompt(card, retrieval_context)
execute_prompt
evaluate_outcome
store_context
update_card_quality
continue_cycle
```

This is the core loop. The SKU is the substrate that makes everything above it possible. Get this right and the truth tower, the leeway network, and the dream/retrain direction all compose cleanly on top of it.

single-SKU saturation at a single address
multiple-SKU saturation at a single address
address that is a candidate for subdivision
subdivision creates new addresses
original address still exists
retrieval prioritizes new address when query matches both
query with wildcard matches both if both exist

The consolidation engine
